parameters.name: featured
parameters.description: Featured handling: "only" (only featured), "first" (featured first), "false" (no special handling)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by field: "latest" (default) or "sessions" or "realtimeUsers" or "dau" or "mau"

parameters.name: excludeHidden
parameters.description: Whether to exclude verses marked as hidden from recommendations (default: false for admin)

isNewUser.description: Whether the user is a new user

userEmail.description: Email of the user to authenticate as

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the signature was generated (must be within 1 minute)

signature.description: ECDSA P-256 digital signature of userEmail:timestamp using container private key

isContainer.description: Whether this is a container token

sessions.description: Total sessions across all user verses

msg.description: Base64url-encoded JSON payload: {"verse":"<verseId>","account":"0x...","sub":{"tier":"basic","exp":<subscription_exp>}|null,"follow":true|false,"exp":<token_exp>}. Token expires in 1 hour.

description.example: A powerful sword for brave warriors

maxPurchasePerUser.description: Maximum number of purchases allowed per user (null = unlimited)

maxPurchasePerPeriod.description: Maximum number of purchases allowed per period per user (null = unlimited)

purchasePeriodDays.description: Purchase period in days (used with maxPurchasePerPeriod). Example: 1 for daily, 7 for weekly, 30 for monthly

description.example: A powerful sword for brave warriors
An updated description
A powerful sword for brave warriors

purchasable.description: Whether the user can purchase this item

purchaseBlockReason.description: Reason why the user cannot purchase this item (only present if purchasable is false)
purchaseBlockReason.example: You have already purchased this item the maximum number of times.

remainingPurchaseQuantity.description: Remaining quantity the user can purchase based on constraints only (null = unlimited). Does not consider stock or balance.

purchasedCount.description: Number of completed purchases the user has made for this item (includes PENDING and COMPLETED, excludes REFUNDED and FAILED)

purchaseLimitReached.description: Whether the user has reached their purchase limit for this item (constraints-based). True when user has purchased the maximum allowed quantity. False when no limit exists or limit not reached.

purchaseLimit.description: Purchase limit per user or per period (null = unlimited). Shows maxPurchasePerUser or maxPurchasePerPeriod value.

purchaseConstraints.description: Detailed purchase constraints for this item

message.example: The item did not work as expected

spinFrom.description: Parent game URL if this is a spin (remix)
